hero.name: Ranielli Montagna

passion.part2: specialized in React, React Native, Node.js, and TypeScript

hero.description: I developed scalable web and mobile products, REST APIs, and micro frontends for critical operations, connecting architecture, user experience, performance, and business outcomes.
hero.seoDescription: 5+ years in software with React, Next.js, React Native, Node.js, TypeScript, Design Systems, CI/CD, testing, accessibility, automation, and AI applied to development.

bio.name: Ranielli Montagna
bio.intro: a full stack software engineer with 5+ years of experience building scalable web and mobile applications. I worked with React, React Native, TypeScript, Node.js, and Next.js on digital products that required performance, code quality, accessibility, and strong user experience.
bio.journey: At Luizalabs, I developed solutions for Magalu physical store operations, impacting inventory and logistics processes across 1,000+ stores and the daily workflow of 1,000+ stock clerks. I also led frontend initiatives in SaaS products, created a Design System adopted across multiple products, and mentored developers.
bio.hobbies: I have a growing interest in Artificial Intelligence applied to software development, especially LLM integration, automation, agents, and the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for productivity and product evolution.

skills.title: My core competencies
skills.subtitle: A precise tech stack tailored for global demands.

experience.subtitle: 5+ years building web and mobile applications, APIs, and product interfaces with a focus on scale, performance, accessibility, technical quality, and measurable impact.

lemon.description: I work on discovering needs with business teams and building AI-first full-stack solutions, turning clear requirements into product and technical decisions.
highlights: Business-team discovery to clarify needs and requirements
Critical review of AI output before product use
Pragmatic evaluation of product and technical trade-offs

luizalabs.description: I worked at Luizalabs, Magalu's technology unit, developing web and mobile applications for physical store operations, REST APIs, and backend solutions for a high-scale national retail environment.
highlights: Developed solutions used in inventory and logistics operations across 1,000+ stores
Contributed to the daily workflow of 1,000+ stock clerks in corporate applications
Maintained REST APIs, integrations, and micro frontends with React, React Native, Node.js, and TypeScript
Collaborated with Product, UX, Backend, and Operations to connect technical decisions to business impact

smarten.description: I worked as a Front-end Tech Lead in SaaS products, leading developers, defining quality standards, evolving interface architecture, and connecting technical decisions to product delivery.
highlights: Technically led a team of developers
Created and maintained a Design System adopted across multiple products
Implemented CI/CD, monitoring, and quality standards
Mentored developers and improved performance, maintainability, and scalability

sbsistemas.description: I consolidated my professional foundation in front-end development, building applications with a focus on usability, maintainability, typing, reusable components, and engineering best practices.
highlights: Developed front-end applications with React, Electron, TypeScript, and JavaScript
Implemented reusable components and interface standards
Applied maintainability, testing, and code quality practices
Built a solid technical foundation for web products

mobileEstoquista.description: Corporate superapp for stockists at Magalu's physical stores, optimizing inventory control, goods receipt, and dispatch.

pratio.title: Pratio - POS for Restaurants
pratio.description: Point of sale (POS) and management system for bars and restaurants, with table and order control, NFC-e issuing, and a digital menu.

paludoImoveis.title: Paludo Imóveis - Real Estate Platform
paludoImoveis.description: Platform for real estate brokers with public catalog, tokenized link sharing, lead capture, and analytics dashboard.

content.title: How I build web projects
content.paragraph1: On this page, you can explore real projects I built with a focus on user experience, performance, and code quality. Each project starts from a concrete problem and is structured to remain scalable and maintainable.
content.paragraph2: Beyond implementation, I also prioritize architecture, observability, and documentation. The goal is to deliver digital products that run well in production and can evolve safely over time.
points: Modular architecture with reusable components and strong typing.
Performance and Core Web Vitals integrated into the development workflow.
Testing, linting, and CI standards to keep quality consistent.
